title: SEPOX® Trinity Keyed-Alike Padlocks Outdoor, Reinforced Laminated Steel Body Heavy-Duty 40MM, Uncuttable Standard Shackle, 3-Pcs-Pack, 6-Pcs Same Keys, for Gym Locker,Toolbox, Shed, Storage
features: 🛡️Superior Material: SEPOX padlocks are constructed with a steel body and zinc plated for maximum durability and robustness, which ensure better resistance to corrosion and weather effects.
🗝️Paired Keys: 3 locks and Each pair of padlocks come with the same keys, this eliminates the worry about losing one key as you have a backup.
🔒Durable Steel Body: The solid construction of our padlocks ensures the utmost security. They are made with 22 layers laminated steel for improved strength and extended lifespan.

🌦️Weather-Resistant: Designed to endure harsh weather conditions, our padlocks are ideal for outdoor use. Thanks to their Blue Waterproof PVC Plastic Ring, they promise longevity and reliable performance.
👍User-friendly Design: SEPOX padlocks are convenient and easy to use. We improve the lock core design to ensure smooth unlocking.
description: Product Description SEPOX Keyed Different Laminated Steel Padlock 1-9/16" Wide Body Features : 1. Easy to use and made of laminated steel, steel plated for maximum protection. 2. Turn the key to pull the shackle to open, insert the shackle to lock and get the keys away 3. Zinc plated for corrison resistence,can be used in outdoor, not easy to rust. 4. Multi-purpose for outdoor, indoor, gun case, mailbox, tool box, small cabinets, machines etc. 5. Keys can be hold in the key box, our shop also provide key box for key storage to avoid keys forgetting. SEPOX Keyed Different Laminated Padlock Specification : Padlock Body Size: (L,H,W) 2.61*1.69*0.97in (6.6 cm x 4.2 cm x 2.4 cm) Lock Type: Keyed padlock Material: Plated Steel and Brass cylinder Weight(per lock): 5.9 oz Shackle Height: 0.95 in (24.24 mm) Solid Hardened Steel Construction Long Shackle and short shackle padlock that are choose for your various needs. Every padlock set comes with 2 Keys. Two keys open all locks in pack. Hardened steel 1/4" diameter shackle Ideal for residential gates & fences, sheds, workshops & garages, storage lockers, tool boxes, school cabinet and more SEPOX Trinity Keyed-Alike Padlocks SEPOX 2Pack Heavy Duty Padlock SEPOX 6Pack Heavy Duty Padlock SEPOX 24Pack Keyed-Alike Padlocks SEPOX 12Pack Heavy Duty Padlock SEPOX 4Pack Heavy Duty Padlock Keyed Alike, 40MM Laminated Steel Lock Body, ...
